name: Write-Output

options.name: -InputObject
options.description: Specifies the objects to send down the pipeline. Enter a variable that contains the objects, or type a command or expression that gets the objects.

options.name: -NoEnumerate
options.description: By default, the `Write-Output` cmdlet always enumerates its output. The NoEnumerate parameter suppresses the default behavior, and prevents `Write-Output` from enumerating output. The NoEnumerate parameter has no effect if the command is wrapped in parentheses, because the parentheses force enumeration. For example, `(Write-Output 1,2,3)` still enumerates the array.

args.name: -InputObject
args.description: Specifies the objects to send down the pipeline. Enter a variable that contains the objects, or type a command or expression that gets the objects.

description: Writes the specified objects to the pipeline.
